text.value:
IF OBJECT_ID('silver.neo_silver') IS NOT NULL
    DROP EXTERNAL TABLE silver.neo_silver;

CREATE EXTERNAL TABLE silver.neo_silver
WITH (
    LOCATION = 'silver/neo_silver/',
    DATA_SOURCE = cosmictracker_storage,
    FILE_FORMAT = parquet_format
) AS
WITH bronze AS (
    SELECT *
    FROM OPENROWSET(
        BULK 'bronze/neo_bronze/**',
        DATA_SOURCE = 'cosmictracker_storage',
        FORMAT = 'PARQUET'
    ) WITH (
        approach_window_date        DATE,
        neo_id                      VARCHAR(50),
        neo_reference_id            VARCHAR(50),
        name                        VARCHAR(200),
        absolute_magnitude_h        FLOAT,
        estimated_diameter_min_km   FLOAT,
        estimated_diameter_max_km   FLOAT,
        is_potentially_hazardous    BIT,
        is_sentry_object            BIT,
        close_approach_date         DATE,
        close_approach_date_full    VARCHAR(50),
        relative_velocity_kph       FLOAT,
        relative_velocity_kps       FLOAT,
        miss_distance_km            FLOAT,
        miss_distance_lunar         FLOAT,
        miss_distance_au            FLOAT,
        orbiting_body               VARCHAR(50),
        nasa_jpl_url                VARCHAR(300),
        _ingested_at                DATETIME2,
        _source_file                VARCHAR(200)
    ) AS rows
),
deduped AS (
    SELECT *,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
            PARTITION BY neo_id, close_approach_date
            ORDER BY _ingested_at DESC
        ) AS rn
    FROM bronze
    WHERE neo_id IS NOT NULL
      AND close_approach_date IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT
    neo_id,
    neo_reference_id,
    name,
    absolute_magnitude_h,
    estimated_diameter_min_km,
    estimated_diameter_max_km,
    ROUND((estimated_diameter_min_km + estimated_diameter_max_km) / 2.0, 4) AS estimated_diameter_avg_km,
    is_potentially_hazardous,
    is_sentry_object,
    close_approach_date,
    relative_velocity_kph,
    miss_distance_km,
    miss_distance_lunar,
    miss_distance_au,
    orbiting_body,
    nasa_jpl_url,
    CASE
        WHEN miss_distance_lunar < 1  THEN 'Very Close'
        WHEN miss_distance_lunar < 10 THEN 'Close'
        WHEN miss_distance_lunar < 50 THEN 'Moderate'
        ELSE 'Distant'
    END AS proximity_category
FROM deduped
WHERE rn = 1;

scripts.text:
IF OBJECT_ID('gold.monthly_neo_summary') IS NOT NULL
    DROP EXTERNAL TABLE gold.monthly_neo_summary;

CREATE EXTERNAL TABLE gold.monthly_neo_summary
WITH (
    LOCATION = 'gold/monthly_neo_summary/',
    DATA_SOURCE = cosmictracker_storage,
    FILE_FORMAT = parquet_format
) AS
SELECT
    YEAR(close_approach_date)  AS approach_year,
    MONTH(close_approach_date) AS approach_month,
    COUNT(DISTINCT neo_id)     AS unique_asteroids,
    COUNT(*)                   AS total_approaches,
    SUM(CASE WHEN is_potentially_hazardous = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS hazardous_approaches,
    AVG(estimated_diameter_avg_km)   AS avg_diameter_km,
    MIN(miss_distance_lunar)         AS closest_approach_lunar_distance,
    AVG(relative_velocity_kph)       AS avg_velocity_kph
FROM silver.neo_silver
GROUP BY YEAR(close_approach_date), MONTH(close_approach_date);

IF OBJECT_ID('gold.hazardous_asteroids') IS NOT NULL
    DROP EXTERNAL TABLE gold.hazardous_asteroids;

CREATE EXTERNAL TABLE gold.hazardous_asteroids
WITH (
    LOCATION = 'gold/hazardous_asteroids/',
    DATA_SOURCE = cosmictracker_storage,
    FILE_FORMAT = parquet_format
) AS
SELECT
    neo_id,
    name,
    close_approach_date,
    estimated_diameter_avg_km,
    miss_distance_lunar,
    miss_distance_km,
    relative_velocity_kph,
    proximity_category,
    orbiting_body
FROM silver.neo_silver
WHERE is_potentially_hazardous = 1
ORDER BY close_approach_date DESC;

text.value:
IF OBJECT_ID('bronze.stg_daily_@{variables('RunDateCompact')}') IS NOT NULL
    DROP EXTERNAL TABLE bronze.stg_daily_@{variables('RunDateCompact')};

CREATE EXTERNAL TABLE bronze.stg_daily_@{variables('RunDateCompact')}
WITH (
    LOCATION = 'bronze/neo_bronze/daily_@{variables('RunDateCompact')}/',
    DATA_SOURCE = cosmictracker_storage,
    FILE_FORMAT = parquet_format
) AS
SELECT
    TRY_CAST(d.[key] AS DATE)                                   AS approach_window_date,
    JSON_VALUE(neo.value, '$.id')                               AS neo_id,
    JSON_VALUE(neo.value, '$.neo_reference_id')                 AS neo_reference_id,
    JSON_VALUE(neo.value, '$.name')                             AS name,
    TRY_CAST(JSON_VALUE(neo.value, '$.absolute_magnitude_h') AS FLOAT) AS absolute_magnitude_h,
    TRY_CAST(JSON_VALUE(neo.value, '$.estimated_diameter.kilometers.estimated_diameter_min') AS FLOAT) AS estimated_diameter_min_km,
    TRY_CAST(JSON_VALUE(neo.value, '$.estimated_diameter.kilometers.estimated_diameter_max') AS FLOAT) AS estimated_diameter_max_km,
    TRY_CAST(JSON_VALUE(neo.value, '$.is_potentially_hazardous_asteroid') AS BIT) AS is_potentially_hazardous,
    TRY_CAST(JSON_VALUE(neo.value, '$.is_sentry_object') AS BIT) AS is_sentry_object,
    TRY_CAST(JSON_VALUE(ca.value, '$.close_approach_date') AS DATE)  AS close_approach_date,
    JSON_VALUE(ca.value, '$.close_approach_date_full')          AS close_approach_date_full,
    TRY_CAST(JSON_VALUE(ca.value, '$.relative_velocity.kilometers_per_hour') AS FLOAT)  AS relative_velocity_kph,
    TRY_CAST(JSON_VALUE(ca.value, '$.relative_velocity.kilometers_per_second') AS FLOAT) AS relative_velocity_kps,
    TRY_CAST(JSON_VALUE(ca.value, '$.miss_distance.kilometers') AS FLOAT)   AS miss_distance_km,
    TRY_CAST(JSON_VALUE(ca.value, '$.miss_distance.lunar') AS FLOAT)        AS miss_distance_lunar,
    TRY_CAST(JSON_VALUE(ca.value, '$.miss_distance.astronomical') AS FLOAT) AS miss_distance_au,
    JSON_VALUE(ca.value, '$.orbiting_body')                     AS orbiting_body,
    JSON_VALUE(neo.value, '$.nasa_jpl_url')                     AS nasa_jpl_url,
    GETDATE()                                                   AS _ingested_at,
    'neo_@{variables('RunDate')}.json'                          AS _source_file
FROM (
    SELECT jsonContent AS BulkColumn
    FROM OPENROWSET(
            BULK 'source/daily/neo_@{variables('RunDate')}.json',
            DATA_SOURCE = 'cosmictracker_storage',
            FORMAT = 'CSV',
            FIELDTERMINATOR = '0x0b',
            FIELDQUOTE = '0x0b'
         ) WITH (jsonContent VARCHAR(MAX)) AS doc
) AS doc
CROSS APPLY OPENJSON(doc.BulkColumn, '$.near_earth_objects') AS d
CROSS APPLY OPENJSON(d.value) AS neo
CROSS APPLY OPENJSON(neo.value, '$.close_approach_data') AS ca
WHERE ca.[key] = '0';

DROP EXTERNAL TABLE bronze.stg_daily_@{variables('RunDateCompact')};

content.query:
IF OBJECT_ID('bronze.neo_bronze') IS NOT NULL
    DROP EXTERNAL TABLE bronze.neo_bronze;

CREATE EXTERNAL TABLE bronze.neo_bronze
WITH (
    LOCATION = 'bronze/neo_bronze/',
    DATA_SOURCE = cosmictracker_storage,
    FILE_FORMAT = parquet_format
) AS
SELECT
    TRY_CAST([date] AS DATE)                        AS approach_window_date,
    neo_id,
    neo_reference_id,
    name,
    TRY_CAST(absolute_magnitude_h AS FLOAT)          AS absolute_magnitude_h,
    TRY_CAST(estimated_diameter_min_km AS FLOAT)     AS estimated_diameter_min_km,
    TRY_CAST(estimated_diameter_max_km AS FLOAT)     AS estimated_diameter_max_km,
    TRY_CAST(is_potentially_hazardous AS BIT)        AS is_potentially_hazardous,
    TRY_CAST(is_sentry_object AS BIT)                AS is_sentry_object,
    TRY_CAST(close_approach_date AS DATE)            AS close_approach_date,
    close_approach_date_full,
    TRY_CAST(relative_velocity_kph AS FLOAT)         AS relative_velocity_kph,
    TRY_CAST(relative_velocity_kps AS FLOAT)         AS relative_velocity_kps,
    TRY_CAST(miss_distance_km AS FLOAT)              AS miss_distance_km,
    TRY_CAST(miss_distance_lunar AS FLOAT)           AS miss_distance_lunar,
    TRY_CAST(miss_distance_au AS FLOAT)              AS miss_distance_au,
    orbiting_body,
    nasa_jpl_url,
    GETDATE()                                        AS _ingested_at,
    'neo_dataset.csv'                                AS _source_file
FROM source.neo_raw;

SELECT TOP 10 * FROM bronze.neo_bronze;

CREATE DATABASE cosmictracker_dw;
GO

---

CREATE SCHEMA source;
GO
CREATE SCHEMA bronze;
GO
CREATE SCHEMA silver;
GO
CREATE SCHEMA gold;
GO

--- 
CREATE MASTER KEY
ENCRYPTION BY PASSWORD = 'StrongPassword@12345';
GO

CREATE DATABASE SCOPED CREDENTIAL WorkspaceIdentity
WITH IDENTITY = 'Managed Identity';
GO


CREATE EXTERNAL DATA SOURCE cosmictracker_storage
WITH (
    LOCATION = 'https://neotracker.dfs.core.windows.net/neotracker',
    CREDENTIAL = WorkspaceIdentity
);
GO

--- 

CREATE EXTERNAL FILE FORMAT csv_format
WITH (
    FORMAT_TYPE = DELIMITEDTEXT,
    FORMAT_OPTIONS (
        FIELD_TERMINATOR = ',',
        FIRST_ROW = 2,
        USE_TYPE_DEFAULT = FALSE
    )
);
GO

CREATE EXTERNAL FILE FORMAT parquet_format
WITH (
    FORMAT_TYPE = PARQUET
);
GO

--- 

CREATE EXTERNAL TABLE source.neo_raw (
    [date]                       VARCHAR(20),
    neo_id                       VARCHAR(50),
    neo_reference_id             VARCHAR(50),
    name                         VARCHAR(200),
    absolute_magnitude_h         VARCHAR(50),
    estimated_diameter_min_km    VARCHAR(50),
    estimated_diameter_max_km    VARCHAR(50),
    is_potentially_hazardous     VARCHAR(10),
    is_sentry_object             VARCHAR(10),
    close_approach_date          VARCHAR(20),
    close_approach_date_full     VARCHAR(50),
    relative_velocity_kph        VARCHAR(50),
    relative_velocity_kps        VARCHAR(50),
    miss_distance_km             VARCHAR(50),
    miss_distance_lunar          VARCHAR(50),
    miss_distance_au             VARCHAR(50),
    orbiting_body                VARCHAR(50),
    nasa_jpl_url                 VARCHAR(300)
)
WITH (
    LOCATION = 'source/neo_dataset.csv',
    DATA_SOURCE = cosmictracker_storage,
    FILE_FORMAT = csv_format
);
GO

--- 
SELECT TOP 10 * FROM OPENROWSET( BULK 'source/neo_dataset.csv', DATA_SOURCE = 'cosmictracker_storage', FORMAT = 'CSV', PARSER_VERSION = '2.0', HEADER_ROW = TRUE ) AS rows;

SELECT TOP 10 * FROM source.neo_raw;
---

IF OBJECT_ID('gold.monthly_neo_summary') IS NOT NULL
    DROP EXTERNAL TABLE gold.monthly_neo_summary;

CREATE EXTERNAL TABLE gold.monthly_neo_summary
WITH (
    LOCATION = 'gold/monthly_neo_summary/',
    DATA_SOURCE = cosmictracker_storage,
    FILE_FORMAT = parquet_format
) AS
SELECT
    YEAR(close_approach_date)  AS approach_year,
    MONTH(close_approach_date) AS approach_month,
    COUNT(DISTINCT neo_id)     AS unique_asteroids,
    COUNT(*)                   AS total_approaches,
    SUM(CASE WHEN is_potentially_hazardous = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS hazardous_approaches,
    AVG(estimated_diameter_avg_km)   AS avg_diameter_km,
    MIN(miss_distance_lunar)         AS closest_approach_lunar_distance,
    AVG(relative_velocity_kph)       AS avg_velocity_kph
FROM silver.neo_silver
GROUP BY YEAR(close_approach_date), MONTH(close_approach_date);

SELECT TOP 10 * FROM gold.monthly_neo_summary;


----- 


IF OBJECT_ID('gold.hazardous_asteroids') IS NOT NULL
    DROP EXTERNAL TABLE gold.hazardous_asteroids;

CREATE EXTERNAL TABLE gold.hazardous_asteroids
WITH (
    LOCATION = 'gold/hazardous_asteroids/',
    DATA_SOURCE = cosmictracker_storage,
    FILE_FORMAT = parquet_format
) AS
SELECT
    neo_id,
    name,
    close_approach_date,
    estimated_diameter_avg_km,
    miss_distance_lunar,
    miss_distance_km,
    relative_velocity_kph,
    proximity_category,
    orbiting_body
FROM silver.neo_silver
WHERE is_potentially_hazardous = 1
ORDER BY close_approach_date DESC;

SELECT TOP 10 * FROM gold.hazardous_asteroids;

IF OBJECT_ID('silver.neo_silver') IS NOT NULL
    DROP EXTERNAL TABLE silver.neo_silver;

CREATE EXTERNAL TABLE silver.neo_silver
WITH (
    LOCATION = 'silver/neo_silver/',
    DATA_SOURCE = cosmictracker_storage,
    FILE_FORMAT = parquet_format
) AS
WITH deduped AS (
    SELECT
        *,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
            PARTITION BY neo_id, close_approach_date
            ORDER BY _ingested_at DESC
        ) AS rn
    FROM bronze.neo_bronze
    WHERE neo_id IS NOT NULL
      AND close_approach_date IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT
    neo_id,
    neo_reference_id,
    name,
    absolute_magnitude_h,
    estimated_diameter_min_km,
    estimated_diameter_max_km,
    ROUND((estimated_diameter_min_km + estimated_diameter_max_km) / 2.0, 4) AS estimated_diameter_avg_km,
    is_potentially_hazardous,
    is_sentry_object,
    close_approach_date,
    relative_velocity_kph,
    miss_distance_km,
    miss_distance_lunar,
    miss_distance_au,
    orbiting_body,
    nasa_jpl_url,
    CASE
        WHEN miss_distance_lunar < 1  THEN 'Very Close'
        WHEN miss_distance_lunar < 10 THEN 'Close'
        WHEN miss_distance_lunar < 50 THEN 'Moderate'
        ELSE 'Distant'
    END AS proximity_category
FROM deduped
WHERE rn = 1;

SELECT TOP 10 * FROM silver.neo_silver;
